name: git-workflow
description: Comprehensive git workflow toolkit — conventional commits, branch naming conventions, PR descriptions, changelog generation, git hooks (Husky, lint-staged, Lefthook), merge conflict resolution, rebasing and recovery (reflog, cherry-pick, stash), and monorepo workflows (CODEOWNERS, selective CI, Changesets). 6 skills, 4 commands, 1 agent. No dependencies.
